title: 返工、重做和质量复检
theme: 从 rework / reprocessing / quality control 开始
goals: 能解释产品不合格时的 sorting、rework 和 recheck 流程
能向客户说明质量控制动作，而不是简单说 factory will fix
能用 corrective action 和 quality standard 稳住客户对质量的信心

review.title: Day 18 复习
items: 昨天练了 material delay、machine issue、quality rework、root cause、revised timeline 和 recovery plan。
今天继续处理生产中的质量异常：发现不合格品后，如何说明筛选、返工、复检和纠正动作。
客户担心质量时，不要说 no problem，要告诉客户你们如何控制风险、如何确认最终质量。

preview.scenario: 工厂发现一部分产品不符合要求，需要筛选、返工、重做或复检。客户担心大货质量，你需要专业解释处理流程，并承诺复检结果会更新给客户。
needToKnow: rework 表示返工，reprocessing 更偏重新处理流程。
sorting 是先把不合格品和合格品分开，避免混入大货。
corrective action 表示纠正措施，比 we will fix it 更专业。

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明产品需要重新处理以达到要求。
vocabulary.example: We will arrange rework for the affected goods.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明需要重新走某个生产或处理流程。
vocabulary.example: Reprocessing will take about two more days.

vocabulary.usage: 用于返工、包装或出货前再次检查。
vocabulary.example: We will recheck the goods before packing.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明工厂控制产品质量的检查和流程。
vocabulary.example: Our quality control team is checking the full batch.

vocabulary.meaning: 不合格品 / 不符合要求的货物
vocabulary.usage: 用于正式说明未达到标准的产品。
vocabulary.example: We separated the nonconforming goods from the approved goods.

vocabulary.usage: 用于把合格品和不合格品分开检查。
vocabulary.example: We are doing sorting to make sure only qualified goods are packed.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明针对质量问题采取的改正和预防动作。
vocabulary.example: We have taken corrective action to prevent the same issue.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明产品必须达到的质量要求。
vocabulary.example: The goods must meet the approved quality standard before shipment.

sentences.label: 说明返工安排
sentences.natural: We will arrange rework for the affected goods.
sentences.business: We will arrange rework for the affected goods and recheck them before packing.

sentences.label: 说明筛选动作
sentences.basic: We check and pick bad ones.
sentences.natural: We are doing sorting to separate the nonconforming goods.
sentences.business: Our quality control team is doing sorting to make sure only qualified goods are packed.

sentences.label: 解释重新处理时间
sentences.natural: Reprocessing will take about two more days.
sentences.business: Reprocessing will take about two more days, and we will send you the recheck result after it is completed.

sentences.label: 说明纠正措施
sentences.natural: We have taken corrective action to prevent the same issue.
sentences.business: We have taken corrective action in production to prevent the same issue from happening again.

sentences.label: 稳定客户质量信心
sentences.natural: We will make sure the goods meet the quality standard.
sentences.business: We will make sure all goods meet the approved quality standard before shipment.

chatAnalysis.problem: redo 太口语，也没有说明返工后会复检。
chatAnalysis.better: We will arrange rework for the affected goods.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: We will arrange rework for the affected goods and recheck them before packing.

chatAnalysis.problem: bad goods 不专业，客户也不知道你如何筛选。
chatAnalysis.better: We separated the nonconforming goods from the approved goods.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Our quality control team is doing sorting to make sure only qualified goods are packed.

chatAnalysis.problem: 没有说明纠正措施，客户无法判断同类问题是否会再次出现。
chatAnalysis.better: We have taken corrective action to prevent the same issue.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: We have taken corrective action in production and will recheck the full batch before shipment.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：说明返工和复检

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Did you find any quality problems?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We found that a small part of the goods needs rework.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will those goods be shipped?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No. We will arrange rework and recheck them before packing.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：筛选不合格品

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How do you make sure the problem goods are not packed?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Our quality control team is doing sorting to separate the nonconforming goods.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will you check the full batch?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we will recheck the full batch before shipment.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户担心质量标准

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We are worried this issue will happen again.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. We have taken corrective action in production.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How can you prove the quality is okay now?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We will send the recheck result and make sure all goods meet the approved quality standard.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：发现不合格品后的返工、筛选和复检沟通

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Hi, I want to update you about the latest quality control result.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Is there any problem with the goods?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We found that a small part of the goods does not fully meet the approved quality standard.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What kind of problem is it?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The issue is related to the logo position on part of the goods.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will those goods be mixed with the good ones?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No. Our quality control team is doing sorting to separate the nonconforming goods from the approved goods.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How many pieces are affected?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We are still checking the exact quantity, and I will update you after the sorting is completed.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What will you do with the affected goods?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We will arrange rework for the affected goods and recheck them before packing.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How long will the rework take?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The reprocessing will take about two more days.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will this delay shipment?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: It may affect the ready date by one to two days, but we are trying to catch up by adding extra working hours.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How do you prevent this from happening again?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We have taken corrective action in production and reminded the team to follow the approved artwork strictly.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send us photos after the rework?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we will send photos and the recheck result after the rework is completed.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need to be sure the final goods are acceptable.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. We will make sure all goods meet the approved quality standard before shipment.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please do not ship anything without final checking.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. We will not pack the goods until the recheck is completed and approved by our quality control team.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please keep us updated every day.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. I will keep you posted on the sorting, rework, and final recheck result.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Thank you. We need transparent communication.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. We will share the real status and the corrective action clearly.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：我们会安排受影响货物返工，并在包装前复检。
exercises.answer: We will arrange rework for the affected goods and recheck them before packing.
acceptable: we will arrange rework for the affected goods and recheck them before packing
we will arrange rework for the affected goods and recheck before packing
exercises.hint: rework 是返工，recheck 是复检。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更专业：bad goods will not ship
exercises.answer: Our quality control team is doing sorting to make sure only qualified goods are packed.
acceptable: our quality control team is doing sorting to make sure only qualified goods are packed
our quality control team is doing sorting to separate the nonconforming goods
exercises.hint: 不要说 bad goods，用 nonconforming goods 或 qualified goods。

exercises.prompt: 填空：We have taken corrective ____ to prevent the same issue.
客户担心不合格品混入大货，哪个回复更合适？
options: Our quality control team is doing sorting to make sure only qualified goods are packed.
exercises.answer: Our quality control team is doing sorting to make sure only qualified goods are packed.
acceptable: our quality control team is doing sorting to make sure only qualified goods are packed
exercises.hint: 要说明 quality control 和 sorting。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：重新处理大约还需要两天。
exercises.answer: Reprocessing will take about two more days.
acceptable: reprocessing will take about two more days
the reprocessing will take about two more days

exercises.prompt: 客户说：How can you prove the quality is okay now? 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: We will send the recheck result and make sure all goods meet the approved quality standard.
acceptable: we will send the recheck result and make sure all goods meet the approved quality standard
we will send you the recheck result and make sure all goods meet the approved quality standard
exercises.hint: 用 recheck result 和 approved quality standard。

homework: 把 rework、reprocessing、recheck、quality control、nonconforming goods、sorting、corrective action、quality standard 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍，重点练 sorting、rework、recheck 的流程说明。
写一段 WhatsApp 回复：工厂发现部分 logo 位置不合格，你要说明 sorting、rework、recheck 和 corrective action。
tomorrow: Day 20 会练出货前照片、视频和验货报告，并处理客户验货反馈。
